subcodes.first_line: Know thou that divine good-pleasure consisteth in this: that His good-pleasure in these days can be attained through naught else save through the pleasure of Him Who is the Manifestation of His Self [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان ارض برضی الله و ان رضائه فی تلک الایام لاتحقق الا برضاء مظهر نفسه الذی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @suffering and imprisonment, @spiritual transformation, @thankfulness; gratitude, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @exhortations and counsels
